info.title: Aegis Secure API
info.description: Zero-trust API for Developer-Controlled Wallets (DCW) and programmatic Policy Engine controls.

post.description: Initiate session flow for onboarding a new user or agent wallet by sending an email verification code (OTP).

email.description: User's or agent's email address to verify

post.description: Verify the sent email OTP challenge and return a secure Bearer token linked to the user's database and wallet record.

challengeId.description: The ID of the OTP challenge

post.description: Revokes the active Bearer session token immediately.

get.description: Retrieve the cryptographic smart wallet metadata associated with the authenticated profile.
Retrieve live stablecoin balances (USDC and EURC) directly from the blockchain relayer.

post.description: Executes a secure gas-abstracted stablecoin transfer, pre-validated against cumulative limits in the Policy Engine.
Perform cross-chain stablecoin bridging via Circle CCTP with gas relay assistance.

recipient.description: Optional recipient EVM address. Defaults to the agent wallet.

202.description: Bridge transfer accepted and processing in background

auditId.description: Use this ID to poll GET /v1/actions/status/:auditId for completion

get.description: Poll the status of a long-running asynchronous action (e.g. cross-chain bridge). Returns the current status, transaction hash (when complete), and any error details.

parameters.name: auditId
parameters.description: The auditId returned from the async action (e.g. bridge)

status.description: Current status of the background task

txHash.description: Transaction hash, available when status is SUCCESS

error.description: Error message, available when status is FAILED

post.description: Retrieve estimated relayer gas fees for a proposed cross-chain bridge transfer.
Poll the consensus and Circle attestation state of an active cross-chain bridge operation.

get.description: Retrieve all source and destination networks supported by Aegis's CCTP router.

post.description: Verify recipient address formatting and retrieve real time gas costs for onchain stablecoin transfer.
Swap between USDC, EURC, and cirBTC directly inside the secure Developer-Controlled Wallet via Circle App Kit.

amount.description: Swap amount as a decimal string with up to 6 decimals

get.description: Retrieve the full tax compliance ledger with FIFO cost-basis accounting for all historical trades.
Retrieve active transaction boundaries and current cumulative limit utilization from the Policy Engine.

200.description: Policy limits and utilization returned successfully

post.description: Secure endpoint to process real-time notifications from Circle. Validates authenticity using a robust, constant-time HMAC-SHA256 comparison.

parameters.name: circle-signature
parameters.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature calculated over raw body using webhooks secret

post.description: Query, paginate, and search the Circle Marketplace service resources catalog by keyword, type, or category.
Inspect and parse pricing, routing details, and payment parameters for a given Marketplace service URL.

get.description: Retrieve the historic catalog inspection log records for the authenticated agent.

post.description: Autonomously executes a payment to a service endpoint using the agent's USDC wallet on the Arc Network.

200.description: Payment successful or free service accessed

get.description: Returns a list of all yield-bearing vaults currently supported by Aegis on the Arc Testnet, including their native CA (Contract Address) and descriptive metadata.

Reads directly from the AegisUSDC vault smart contract to return live metrics including Total Value Locked (TVL), estimated APY, and the current Price Per Share. Crucial for understanding appreciation.

Returns the authenticated agent's current position in the vault. Includes the number of shares held, their current USDC value, and importantly, the `lockExpiresAt` timestamp that indicates when MEV cooldowns end.

post.description: Deposits raw USDC into the yield vault and mints `aUSDC` shares for the agent. The backend automatically handles the ERC-20 approvals required before depositing. **Warning:** This will trigger an MEV cooldown lock preventing immediate withdrawals.
Burns `aUSDC` shares to withdraw the underlying USDC (including any accumulated yield appreciation) back to the agent's wallet. Will return `403` if the MEV cooldown lock is still active.
Register a conditional swap order that executes automatically when a target price is reached. The Wealth Sentinel monitors this intent and triggers execution.
Cancel an active limit order by its UUID.

Register a recurring dollar-cost averaging schedule with a fixed number of orders. The Wealth Sentinel executes each leg automatically at the specified interval and marks the schedule as COMPLETED once all orders are fulfilled.

totalOrders.description: Total number of recurring orders to execute before the schedule auto-completes

post.description: Cancel an active DCA schedule by its UUID.
Split a USDC deposit across the Aegis aUSDC Vault and Synthra V3 concentrated liquidity in a single atomic action. Weights must add up to 100, and synthraWeight is capped at 80.
Close the agent's active Synthra V3 concentrated liquidity position and collect all liquidity plus accrued trading fees back to USDC. No request body required.

200.description: Synthra V3 position closed and fees collected

get.description: Retrieve all active limit orders and DCA schedules for the authenticated agent, including their current status (PENDING, EXECUTED, CANCELLED).
Retrieve portfolio performance metrics for the authenticated agent, including total deposits, current value, yield earned, and active position breakdown across Aegis Vault and Synthra V3.

BearerAuth.description: Provide raw API session token issued by `/v1/connect/complete`
